metadata.title: General Listings Marketplace Platform Deployment and Operating Surfaces
metadata.description: Primary deployment, distribution, analytics, operations, and engineering channels used to deliver and operate the General Listings Marketplace Platform domain.
notes: This model maps product bricks to the main channels through which they are deployed, distributed, triggered, or operated.
Products link back to this model through deploymentChannelRef and deploymentEnvironmentRef on delivery paths.

channels.description: Primary live runtimes where domain backend services, APIs, workers, and orchestration jobs execute.
Primary production runtime for customer-facing and operational application services.

environments.description: Primary live cloud runtime for deployable domain services.
